name: tavily
description: Codex-packaged Tavily agent skills for web search, extraction, crawling, mapping, and deep research.

interface.shortDescription: Search, extract, crawl, map, and research the web from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Packages Tavily's upstream agent skills for Codex with a repo-local marketplace entry and direct skill discovery under the plugin.
defaultPrompt: Search the web for recent sources on a topic.
Extract the key content from this URL.
Research this topic and summarize with citations.
